WATCHFIRE 8MM EMC: Remove and properly dispose of current manual reader board cabinet. Furnish and install to existing poles a double sided Watchfire 8mm RBG (full color) electronic message center. EMC measures 4´-5"H x 8´-3"W with an active viewing area that measures 4´H x 8´W. Includes Ignite OPx (cloud based) operating software, web based software training with a Watchfire representative, 4G wireless communications with Watchfire cellular life-of-sign data plan, and a 5 year parts and labor warranty. NOTE: THIS SIGN WILL REQUIRE (2) DEDICATED 120V CIRCUITS WITH 30 AMP BREAKERS. POWER TO SIGN BY OTHERS.

Customer is reporting that the sign on the rooftop south elevation (facing I-235) is not working. All signs and parking lights at this building are on a photocell and come on and off at the same time. Please send service to trouble shoot and repair non-working sign on top of the building. You can access the rooftop from inside the building. Please contact Lori Harken 24 hours before at 515-238-8180. Lori will let you in building and show you where access to the roof is located.
